title: gymnogramma ascensionis
intro: Gymnogramma ascensionis is a type of fern plant that belongs to the family Pteridaceae, commonly found in tropical regions. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Gymnogramma ascensionis include its ability to treat various ailments, such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to lower blood sugar levels. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties, but more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
